summary: Completed comprehensive testing of GuessIt football prediction app clone. Backend APIs working correctly (14/15 tests passed), frontend UI fully functional with proper navigation, auth flows, and modern design. Admin login successful. Only minor issues found.

validation_issues.issue: Registration endpoint requires confirm_password field but backend test only sent email and password
validation_issues.impact: Registration validation mismatch between frontend and backend expectations

console_warnings.impact: Expected behavior - connections establish after login

passed_tests: Backend system metrics showing MongoDB connected
Admin login with correct credentials successful
Current user endpoint working after authentication
All football match endpoints responding correctly
Global and weekly leaderboard endpoints working
Frontend homepage loads with GUESSIT logo and all navigation links
Login page loads with proper form inputs
Register page loads with complete registration form
WebSocket connections establish after login (Chat, Notifications, Friends)
action_item_for_main_agent: No critical issues found. The registration endpoint validation mismatch is minor - frontend sends confirm_password but backend test didn't include it. FOOTBALL_API_KEY is not configured (as expected per context) so match data is empty, but all endpoints work correctly.
